title: Kesha Rogers' Address to the San Francisco Schiller Institute seminar
description:
Kesha Rogers – After running two successful campaigns for the Democratic nomination in the NASA-district of Houston, TX for U.S. Congress, Kesha ran a nearly successful insurgent U.S. Senate campaign for the Democratic nomination to upend the entire political map in 2014. She is an outspoken critique of President Obama, especially his cuts to NASA and his drone murder policy, and is a leading figure in the LaRouche political movement internationally. Currently, she is leading a revival of the manned-space program in the Houston area and throughout the nation in the tradition of leading space scientist Krafft Ehricke.

The Schiller Institute's Strategic Seminar in San Franciso on June 8, drew 70 guests and experts to discuss the urgent topic "Will the U.S. Join the New Silk Road? Global Scientific Development or Nuclear War." The question is whether to join the One Belt, One Road world infrastructure plan put forward by China, or stick with the collapsing Western economies, whose bankruptcy is fueling the danger of a global nuclear war.

See the full proceedings here: lpac.co/sf-schiller-seminar
